example_tasks: Complete step 6 of the onboarding process
Review item 6 in the project backlog
Update the 6th slide of the presentation
Process the 6th invoice of the month
Check the 6th requirement in the spec sheet
Organize the 6th folder in the archive
Prepare the 6th report for the board
Update the 6th entry in the database
Complete the 6th module of the course
Draft the 6th email in the sequence
reasoning: This icon is highly specific to numerical ordering or sequencing. It is useful for tasks that are part of a numbered list or a multi-step project, but it lacks semantic meaning for general task categories.
